"[21] 89-S3 SECURITY STATES LASO AND LACOFD ADVSD THEY CHECKED AREA AND SO CHECKED IN AQUEDEUT ON FRONTAGE RD AND DID NOT LOCATE VEH "
"[20] 89-S3 EVIDENCE VEH MAY HAVE GONE INTO WATER - STILL INVESTIGATING SCENE - WILL HAVE A WATCH RESPOND W/ LACOFD TO INVESTIGATE FURTHER"

"[18] 89-3C REQ TO SEE IF SEARCH AND RESCUE POSS AVAIL TO ASSIST - TIRE MARKS ON DIRT LEADING INTO AQUEDUCT - FLASHLIGHT UNABLE TO SEE DEEP ENOUGH INTO WATER TO SEE IF VEH IS SUBMERGED AND AQUEDUCT IS APPROX 300 FT ACROSS "
"[15] 89-3C REQ AIR IF AVAIL TO HELP SEARCH AQUEDUCT FOR ANY POSS SUBMERGED VEHS "
"[13] 89-3C FIRE WAS 1097 - THEY WENT 1098 "
"[12] 89-3C PER SECURTY THEY DID NOT OBSERVE ANY VEH SUMBERGE INTO WATER - BEEN APPROX 6-8 HRS SINCE THEY NOTICED FENCE DMG "
